name: South Seas Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can pineapple chunks in juice, 13.5 ounces
2 cups sweet potatoes, canned, cooked, sliced
recipeInstructions:
CASSEROLE:
1. Drain pineapple and reserve syrup.
2. Layer pineapple chunks, cubed ham and sliced cooked sweet potatoes in a 2-quart casserole.
3. In a bowl, combine brown sugar, flour, curry powder and pepper.
4. Blend in the reserved pineapple juice, water and vinegar to the mixture.
5. Pour the mixture over the casserole.
6. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
7. Cover with topping and bake an additional 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
TOPPING:
1. In a bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, salt and cinnamon (if using).
2. Add chopped nuts to the mixture.
3. Beat egg yolks until creamy.
4. Stir in milk and melted margarine.
5. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir just until dry particles are moistened.
6. Beat egg whites until stiff.
7. Fold the beaten egg whites into the batter before baking.
